name: unattended-review
summary: Hybrid profile — aggressive runtime (auto tool use, no prompts) BUT the reviewer agent gates every commit/push. Best for unattended scheduled work.
when_to_use: Scheduled tasks, cron-driven maintenance, PR reviews run overnight. Runtime is unrestricted; safety comes from reviewer before external effects.

reviewer.note: HARD gate — no commit or push proceeds without reviewer approval.

memory_rules: Reviewer verdicts logged to engram with topic_key cc/autonomy/review-outcomes/{date}.
Session summary must include: tasks attempted, verifier pass/fail, reviewer verdicts.
best_for: PR review (reads diffs, posts comments, never merges without reviewer ok)
Dependency audit (runs scans, files tickets, no code changes)
Docs drift (detects doc staleness, opens issues)
